name: Soulmate
short_description: Soulmate is a Hack-and-Slash, Action Adventure! Use strategic abilities to fight your way through Demons, and progress in an Emotional story. Soulmate is about what insanity can create, in a world full of coincidences.
detailed_description:
Soulmate is a Hack-and-Slash, Action Adventure!

Use strategic abilities in to fight your way through Demons, and progress in an Emotional story. Soulmate is about what insanity can create, in a world full of coincidences.

Features



- Fast-Paced-Action
Use your blades in a Combat System full of Gore, and non-stop action.

- Story
Enter a world where coincidences (or Fate?), is ever-expanding, creating insanity.
